entities.name: V (Vrijen)
entities.context: The individual associated with the knowledge system.

entities.name: Production
entities.context: The phase in which the system becomes operational.

entities.name: Meeting Detection
entities.context: A feature of the system that automatically identifies meetings.

entities.name: Profile Creation/Updates
entities.context: A feature that creates or updates user profiles within the system.

entities.name: Digest Sections
entities.context: Parts of the system that compile information.

entities.name: Urgent Meetings
entities.context: Meetings that are prioritized and flagged as urgent.

entities.name: Monitoring and Logging
entities.context: The process by which activities are tracked and recorded.
